creator: gcr@tharned.org
text:
It appears that this ticket is actually a duplicate of bug #262935. Bug #262935 explains what the problem is and how to fix it. Also see this thread: <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2022-April/001756.html>.

Can the sendmail port be upgraded to 8.17.1.9 soon?
